Reaction rates were obtained using SMARAGD code for
calculation of nuclear cross sections and reaction
rates of astrophysical interest. Measured cross were
reproduced/fitted  varying nuclear level density and
gamma ray strength function. Reaction rates were
calculated with adjusted parameters obtained in fit.
